---
title: Consumer confidence recovering from historic lows
description: Line chart showing the University of Michigan Index of Consumer Sentiment
  since 2007.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-consumer-sentiment-lc/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Economic Indicators
tags:
  - Consumer Sentiment
  - National
  - Economic Confidence
  - Line Chart
image: consumer_sentiment_lc.svg
chart:
  title: Consumer confidence recovering from historic lows
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  dataSource: University of Michigan, Surveys of Consumers
  sourceUrl: https://www.sca.isr.umich.edu/
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - umich-consumer-sentiment
usesPackages: []
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks the University of Michigan Index of Consumer Sentiment, a leading indicator of economic confidence and spending behavior.](./consumer_sentiment_lc.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks the University of Michigan Index of Consumer Sentiment, a leading indicator of economic confidence and spending behavior.

## Key Findings

- Consumer sentiment hit historic lows during the Great Recession and in 2022
- Confidence is recovering but remains below pre-2007 levels
- The index shows high sensitivity to economic shocks

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/consumer_sentiment.R` in the producing project.


::: {.callout-note}
## Dangling references

The following slugs are referenced by this project but do not yet have nodes in Dataverse. They are intentionally preserved as future content needs:

- `dataset/umich-consumer-sentiment`
:::
